## summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation added or updated.
- [ ] Examples updated, if user-facing behaviour changed.
- [ ] Event-log or contract changes documented.
- [ ] Status labels updated if this changes released/experimental/planned scope.
- [ ] Benchmarks updated if performance claims changed.

## evidence

List commands run and relevant artefacts.
